chapter_title.en: Chapter on the Virtue of Fasting

text: 1780 - وَ قَالَ اَلصَّادِقُ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ : «لِلصَّائِمِ فَرْحَتَانِ فَرْحَةٌ عِنْدَ إِفْطَارِهِ وَ فَرْحَةٌ عِنْدَ لِقَاءِ رَبِّهِ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ».

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.1780 - Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq (as) said:
"The fasting person has two joys: a joy when he breaks his fast and a joy when he meets his Lord (azj), the Almighty."
